player_notes.luka doncic: Out for Lakers vs. Rockets series (injury). Major usage shift to LeBron James.
player_notes.austin reaves: Out for Lakers vs. Rockets series (injury). Elevates LeBron and Kennard roles significantly.
player_notes.kevin durant: Out for Game 1 vs. Lakers with right knee injury; status for Game 2 unclear. Rockets' offense severely compromised without him.
player_notes.lebron james: With Doncic and Reaves out, LeBron operating as primary playmaker/scorer — posted 19 pts, 13 ast, 8 reb in Game 1. Elevated assist ceiling while Doncic/Reaves remain sidelined.
player_notes.luke kennard: Career playoff-high 27 pts in Game 1 vs. Rockets; benefiting from Doncic/Reaves absences with expanded role and shot volume.
player_notes.immanuel quickley: Missed Game 1 vs. Cavaliers with hamstring injury. Status for Game 2 uncertain; monitor availability.
player_notes.jamal murray: 30 pts in Game 1 vs. Timberwolves, going 16-for-16 from the line. High-usage game; note free-throw volume inflated points total.
player_notes.deandre ayton: Starting and elevated role with Lakers shorthanded (Doncic/Reaves out); credited as key contributor in Game 1 win. Monitor minutes/role in Game 2.

game_notes.HOU vs LAL: Kevin Durant (knee) out; Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves also out for Lakers. Massive rotation shifts on both sides — LeBron James and Luke Kennard seeing inflated usage for LAL; Rockets missing their primary scorer.
game_notes.TOR vs CLE: Immanuel Quickley (hamstring) missed Game 1; his availability for Game 2 is uncertain and affects Toronto's guard rotation and assist/scoring distribution.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: HOU enters on 8-game win streak, Durant averaging 26 PPG on 52-40-87 splits. Team has found its groove with Durant as offensive anchor + young core (Sengun, Amen Thompson, Jabari Smith Jr.).
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news confirms Kevin Durant missed Game 1 vs. LAL with a right knee injury sustained at practice this week. LAL won 107-98. Durant's absence was the key factor in the upset — context doc has no mention of this injury.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add Kevin Durant (HOU) to the Playoff Injury Landscape as CONFIRMED OUT for at least Game 2, with right knee injury (sustained in practice week of Apr 14). Flag return timeline as unknown. Update LAL vs HOU series diary to note Durant missed G1, LAL won 107-98 behind LeBron (19 pts, 13 AST) and Kennard (27 pts career playoff-high). This fundamentally changes the series dynamic — HOU is no longer full-strength and the catastrophic injury mismatch now runs in both directions.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Quickley hamstring (Apr 12 exit): if he misses games, TOR loses secondary creator and screening action. Barrett + Shead absorb minutes but offensive ceiling drops. Availability for CLE R1 (Apr 18) uncertain.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news confirms Quickley missed Game 1 of the CLE-TOR series. CLE won 126-113. The uncertainty has resolved — he was OUT for G1.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Quickley's status to CONFIRMED OUT Game 1 (played). Note he missed G1 of R1 vs CLE (CLE won 126-113, Mitchell 32 pts, Strus 24 off bench). Reassess G2 availability — hamstring tightness with prior plantar fasciitis history on same leg suggests continued day-to-day status. Update CLE-TOR series diary with G1 result.

suggested_context_updates.conflict: Game 1 has been played. NYK won 113-102. Brunson scored 28 pts (22 in first half), Towns had 25 pts (19 in second half). Series is now 1-0 NYK.

Update the pre-series header to reflect NYK leads 1-0. Note Towns' second-half dominance as a pattern to watch in G2.

suggested_context_updates.conflict: Game 1 has been played. DEN won 116-105. Murray scored 30 pts going 16-of-16 from the free throw line. Jokic had a triple-double. Gordon had a quiet first half per reporting. Series is now 1-0 DEN.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Game 1: Apr 18, 1 PM ET at Cleveland. TOR swept season series 3-0, but all before Dec — pre-Harden CLE.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Game 1 has been played. CLE won 126-113. Mitchell scored 32 pts, Strus had 24 off the bench. Series is now 1-0 CLE.
